## Domain Rules (css-animations)
# css-animations — Rules

Rules confirmed 3+ times. Apply by default.

---

**RULE-001: stroke-draw.js data-delay unit is seconds, not milliseconds**
`data-delay="0.2"` = 200ms delay. `data-delay="200"` = 200 second delay.
Applies to: any `[data-stroke-draw]` element.
Source: confirmed in this session (2026-04-24) when hero-line had `data-delay="200"` causing broken animation sequence.
